data: An opisthographic lead tablet from Sicily with a financial document and a curse concerning choregoi

D.R. Jordan, ‘An Opisthographic Lead Tablet from Sicily with a Financial Document and a Curse Concerning Choregoi’, in The Greek Theatre and Festivals. Documentary Studies., ed. P. Wilson (Oxford: Oxford University Press, 2007), 335–50
The text is on the reverse of an opisthographic lamina. The right-hand edge of the textblock is rather ragged. Horizontal writing, left to right.
Rare Book Room, University of North Carolina
